name: com.ivanmurzak.unity.mcp.terrain
description: MCP Tools for Unity Terrain - Enhance your Unity projects with AI-powered terrain authoring tools using the MCP framework. Create Terrain GameObjects and TerrainData, set heightmap resolution and size, set/sample heights, manage TerrainLayers, paint texture layers, configure detail/tree prototypes, place trees, set neighbors, and generically get/modify any terrain component via natural language.
